name: context-mode-rust
description: MCP server and plugin that solves context window flooding. Exposes 18 MCP tools across 6 categories: core execution (execute, execute_file, batch_execute), knowledge base (index, search), administration (fetch_and_index, stats, doctor, upgrade, purge, insight), semantic search (semantic_search, index_embeddings, context_pack), vault graph (vault_index, vault_graph), and code analysis (dead_code, complexity, dep_graph). Supports 11 sandboxed languages, 12 IDE platforms, and 11 skills.
